name: Warm Mushroom Salad (Vegetarian)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound white mushrooms, trimmed and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring the water, lemon juice, and salt to a boil.
2. Add the mushrooms, return to a boil, and simmer, covered, for 3 minutes.
3. Drain well.
4. In a medium bowl, combine the grated onion, sugar, and cream. Toss with the mushrooms.
5. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
6. Place several leaves of lettuce on each of four salad plates.
7. Spoon some mushrooms and cream over the lettuce and serve warm.
Serves 4.
